channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Le Google Pixel 9 et le Google TV Streamer 4K se retrouvent dans un pack à moins de 500 € (alors que l’ensemble coûte normalement plus de 1 000 €)
item.description: Le photophone Google Pixel 9 et le boîtier multimédia Google TV Streamer 4K sont deux références du géant américain que l'on a plutôt appréciées lors de nos tests. Si elles vous intéressent, sachez qu'elles sont actuellement proposées dans un pack à 499 euros au lieu de 1 018 euros.

item.title: Instacart Promo Code: $15 Off | May 2026
item.description: Find the best Instacart promo code for massive savings in May 2026

item.title: HelloFresh Coupon Codes: 55% Off + Free Meals
item.description: Get up to 55% off and free meal boxes using a HelloFresh coupon code today. Discover our best codes and discounts to let you save time and money.

item.title: 50% Off Blue Apron Promo Codes | May 2026
item.description: Browse chef-curated meal plans, plus get $25 off with an exclusive Blue Apron coupon code, plus 50% off your first 2 orders, and more top coupons on WIRED.

item.title: T-Mobile Promo Codes: 25% Off | May
item.description: Discover how to save on T-Mobile Business Internet and phone plans, from sign-up perks and switching rewards to bundled offers and free lines.

item.title: Logitech Promo Codes and Deals: Up to $100 Off
item.description: Score up to $100 off refurbished premium products, free shipping on orders of $29+, and more at Logitech.

item.title: Western Digital Promo Code: 15% Off
item.description: Get 15% off your first order at Western Digital when you register your email.

item.title: Exclusive Shed Rain Coupon: 15% Off
item.description: Get 15% off functional, fashionable umbrellas with our exclusive Shed Rain discount code.

item.title: First job? Lean into emotional intelligence to thrive
item.description: Technical skills may have gotten you hired, but emotional intelligence will be the difference between surviving and thriving. Congrats! You got your first job! While you may have had temporary jobs while going to school, you might be feeling a variety of emotions, including excitement as well as some anxiety at the prospect of a first full-time job. While being hired means your employer believes that you already have the basic technical skills and academic knowledge to succeed, emotional intelligence will make the difference between thriving and surviving....
